result.api36_notes: Official rootAVD (archived since Oct 2023) supports up to API 33 (Android 13). For Android 15 (API 35) and Android 16 (API 36), community forks are available: 1) dynamicfire/rootAVD - fixes Magisk 30.x BusyBox detection issue, tested on API 35/36; 2) qig123/rootAVD2026 - Windows-focused fork tested with Magisk v30.6 and API 36. Both require FAKEBOOTIMG argument for Android 13+. Original repo moved to GitLab but was archived. [知识来源: Web搜索（五引擎并行）- "rootAVD Android 15 API 36 2026"]
